TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O Rikisi no Afohan Do'edoen ko tilid no mikakinkiway,nani anini i'ayaw no 5ofad miheca,iraay to ko tamdaw a maro' itini, o ciko no lalan no isifo'ay acia ko kaitinian nona kitakit,nengengen ko rikisi nona kitakit, cila malalood cila marawraw ko kasaniyaro', nawhani, nano to'asan malafiyaway to romaroma a hontian kitakit, patinakohan: Posi hontian kitakit, Koncie hontian sifo, Kuisan hontian kitakit, Tang Caw, Mutor hontian kitakit(Urto a sowal:ŸÖÿ∫ŸÑ€å€Å ÿ≥ŸÑÿ∑ŸÜÿ™‚Äé, falicen to:Mughliyah Saltanat‚Äé,Posi sowal :ŸÖÿ∫ŸÑ€å€Å ÿ≥ŸÑÿ∑ŸÜÿ™‚Äé,Roma tilid:mugÕühliyah saltanat,ÊÑèÁÇ∫"ËíôÂÖÄÂÖíËòá‰∏πÂúã", Cin Caw , Hontian Ikiris ato Rosya itinitay tona kitakit a malala'is. Ira ho ko katelang a Hontian Kirisiya Kitakit ato ci Cinkisuhan (ÊàêÂêâÊÄùÊ±ósowal no Monko:·Ý¥·Ý¢·Ý©·Ý≠·Ý¢·Ý∞ ·Ý¨·ÝÝ·Ý≠·ÝÝ·Ý®,ÈÆëÂüπËΩâÂØ´:ƒåinggis qaŒ≥an,tilid no Sirir:–ß–∏–Ω–≥–∏—Å —Ö–∞–∞–Ω). O Nikowan no Roma a Finacadan Ano nengnengen ko rikis no Afohan, kinapinapina to malengat a mapalo ato malowid no roma a finacadan, o roma 'i, o kakitaan no niyaro' sanga' saton niyah teked a sofitay milood to fiyaw a niyaro' malakitakit sato a malahad, patinako han i sasfo'an no 18sici, mapatireng ko Ayhamaytosa Tolani a hontian kitakit(ShƒÅh Durr-i-DurrƒÅn, 1724~1772),o sa'ayaway a kitakit itini. Ona honti tonini 'i, so'emetay ko faloco' orasaka pecihen ningra ko sera no kitakit a palilam to fiyafiyaw. Hakowaay ko kasasiromaroma finacadan ko mikowanay,silsil han i la'eno: Posi Hontian a Pikowan('ayaw no 6 siciÔºç'ayaw 330 miheca) Konci Hontian a Pikowan('ayaw 324mihecaÔºç'yaw187miheca) Pakotoriya Hontian Pikowan(latek 'ayaw no 250 mihecaÔºçlatek 'ayaw no 135 miheca) Kusan Hontian Kitakit(Kushan)(sili 1siciÔºç3sici) Tang ho(659 mihecaÔºç751 miheca) Arapiya Hontian Kitakit(751Âπ¥Ôºç820Âπ¥) Kacini Hontian Kitakit(962 mihecaÔºç1151 miheca) Posi Kol Hontian Kitakit(1151 mihecaÔºç1215 miheca) Posi Kalti Hontian Kitakit(1245 mihecaÔºç1389 miheca) Timol Hontian Kitakit(1389 mihecaÔºç1507 miheca) Monor Hontian Kitakit(Mughliyah Saltanat‚Äé)(16 siciÔºç1747 miheca) Afohan Hontian Kitakit Toranni Hontian Kitakit(1747 mihecaÔºç1826 miheca) Palakocayi Hontian Kitakit(1836 mihecaÔºç1973 miheca) Ingataay Miheca No aniniay a Afohan Kitakit namapatireng itiyaay ho 1746 miheca Toranni Hotian miheca, ono aniniay to a Afohan kitakit 'i, 1747 miheca a , o ikor tono 19sici malikelong to ko 'icel nona kitakit, sa itira a mala'afas ko Ikiris ato Rosiya to sapi'ecoaw a maro'. Ya malahonti ci Amanula(Amanullah Khan, ÿ£ŸÖÿßŸÜ ÿßŸÑŸÑŸá ÿÆÿßŸÜ ,) ta misiiked a mapatireng ko aniniay a kitakit i 1919 miheca ,itira ko pisa'eli to Ikiris to malalenay a kakaketonan a tilid, manaay ko Ikiris orasaka misatapang to sakakinatolo a pilood to Ikiris,yo malowid to ko Ikiris i, matatilid to malalenay a kakaketonan i 1921miheca 11 folad 22 romi'ad,caay to ko kakowanan no Ikiris. Nikawrira, nani 1900 miheca taha 2001 miheca 11 ko malatapangay a mikowan tona kitakit awaay ko pakalaheciay to kalatapang i kamaro'an. O samahinakeray a mihecaan no Afohan 'i, itiray i kalahontian ni Mohanmot Casirsa( nani 1933 miheca tahira i 1973 miheca. Itiya i 1973 miheca mafelih no cecaay ko pona a salikaka ningra ci Mohanmot Tautehan , mapalasawad ko hontian a faco no kitakit. 1978 miheca ira ko picoker no Rosiya to Afohan Kalotamdawan Tang a mifelih to sifo, ci Mohanmot Tautehan ato laloma'an 'aloman ko mipatayan. Tomireng to kona Afohan Kalotamdawan Tang mitatoy to sakowan no kitakit, nikawrira palili'en no Amirika to payso ko Islam Sofitay )mamifelih to aniniay a sifo, sapidipotaw to aniniay a sifo ko Rosiya i 1979 miheca 12 folad 24 romi'ad ocor han to ko sofitay a mitoker to nicokeran no Amirika a komi,na onini to ko sakala'aised no Rosiya ato Akirika, satapang sato ko lalood to mo'etep ko mihecan, 'aloman ko mahikedaay a kalotamdaw tona lalood, 1989 miheca sawad sato ko Rosiya a malalood nokay sanay to ko polong no sofitay. Nikapolongan Kitakit Nani ikor tono 1970 miheca, wataay to ko nikapadesan nona kitakit to lalood ato rawraw,ano irairaay ko pipasasinga'ay no roma a kitakit, caay ka tangsol sa a malali'ay ko malalooday, itiya sato i 2001 miheca warawar han to palasawad koya ci'icelay a mikowan nani 1996 miheca a Talipan Sifo Itini tona Nikapolongan Kitakit a pikowanan a mihwca i,masasiromaroma ho 6 a sifo: Afohan Nikapolongan kitakit (1973 miheca -1978 miheca) Afohan Finawlan Kitakit (1978 miheca -1992 miheca) Afohan Islam Kitakit (1992-1996) Afohan Islam Kakitaan Kitakit (1996-2001) Afohan Islam Kitakit (pacarcaran sifo 2001-2004) Afohan Islam Nikapolongan Kitakit (2004-) Ikor no 2000 miheca(2000Âπ¥‰ª•Âæå) Ikaleponan no 2001 miheca, masaopo ko kakeridan no masacefacefangay i Toic masasowal, mihai patireng to fa'elohay a faco no sifo, matoro' ci Hamito Karcayi mala'ayaway kamaro'an tamdaw no pacarcaray sifo, tona kasasowal 'i, malaheci a miketon to sapisanga'aw to fa'elohay a kinpo ato misaharaka to sinkiw no congtong, 2004 miheca 10 folad 9 romi'ad sa'ayaway ho a pisinkiw to congtong i Afohan, o sakcecay namisinnkiwan a congtong ci Hamito Karcayi, nikawrira niaro'an ho no sofitay no Amirika ko Afohan. 2009 miheca saka 8 folad sakakinatosa a pisinkiw to congton ci Hamito Karcayi ko maalaay tona sinkiw, toya miheca saka11 folad maro' i katayalan. 2014 miheca pasaliyad heca a misinkiw to congtong,ci Kani ko maalay malacongton, saka 9 folad saka 29 romi'ad maro' i kamaro'an no congtong, toroen nigra ci Apotola malakakeridan no sifo. Itiya i 2009 miheca yo maala malacongtong no Amilika ci Opama mahapinang ningra ko caay ko mamalowid kona lalood, sa milekal miliyas ko sofitay no Amirika i 2014 miheca,i 2015 miheca tolo a ofad ko miliyasay sofitay no Amirika. 2020 miheca saka 2 folad saka 29 romi'ad masasowal ko Amirika ato Talipan i tatapangay niyaro' Toha no Kata, makakaketon to sowal:ikor no 14 a folad ha'emin sato a miliyas to Afohan ko sofitay no Amirika, palaheci han to kona 18 a miheca ko kakaya' a kalalood. 2021 miheca namalacongtong no Amirika ci Payten, tangsol sa amilekal tona aniniay miheca saka 9 folad lahecien no sofitay a miliyas ko Afohan. Pihapinangan Tilid . 2016-10-05 (2016-10-11). Vogelsang, Willem. The Afghans. Wiley Blackwell. 2002: 18 (6 July 2019). ISBN 0-631-19841- 5. (ÂéüÂßãÂÖßÂÆπÂ≠òÊ™îÊñº9 July 2019). Ë¶ã"Êñ∞ÂÖÉÂè≤" . 2020-03-01.

ma…æafijawaj to~u ro~umaro~uma a ƒßo~untian kitakit, patinako~uƒßan: po~usi ƒßo~untian kitakit, ko~un ¶i…ô ƒßo~untian sifo~u, ko~u~uisan ƒßo~untian kitakit, ta≈ã ¶aw, mo~u~uto~ur ƒßo~untian ko~u so~ufitaj a mito~uk…ôr to~u ni ¶o~uk…ôran no~u amirika a ko~umi,na o~unini to~u ko~u saka…æa °ais…ô…¨~…Æ no~u ro~usija ato~u akirika, satapa≈ã sato~u ko~u …æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æ to~u mo~u °…ôt…ôp ko~u so~ufitaj. nikapo~u…æo~u≈ãan kitakit nani iko~ur to~uno~u **** miƒß…ô ¶a, wataaj to~u ko~u nikapa…¨~…Æ…ôsan no~una kitakit to~u …æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æ ato~u rawraw,ano~u irairaaj ko~u pipasasi≈ãa °aj no~u ro~uma a kitakit, ¶aaj ka ta≈ãso~u…æ sa a ma…æa…æi °aj ko~u ma…æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æaj, itija sato~u i **** miƒß…ô ¶a warawar ƒßan to~u pa…æasawa…¨~…Æ ko~uja ¶i °i ¶…ô…æaj a miko~uwan nani **** miƒß…ô ¶a a ta…æipan sifo~u itini to~una nikapo~u…æo~u≈ãan kitakit a piko~uwanan a miƒßw ¶a i,masasiro~umaro~uma ƒßo~u * a sifo~u: afo~uƒßan nikapo~u…æo~u≈ãan kitakit (**** miƒß…ô ¶a -**** miƒß…ô ¶a) afo~uƒßan miƒßai patir…ô≈ã to~u fa °…ô…æo~uƒßaj a fa ¶o~u no~u sifo~u, mato~uro~u ° ¶i ƒßamito~u kar ¶aji ma…æa °ajawaj kamaro~u °an tam…¨~…Æaw no~u pa ¶ar ¶araj sifo~u, to~una kasaso~uwa…æ °i, ma…æaƒß…ô ¶i a mik…ôto~un to~u sapisa≈ãa °aw to~u fa °…ô…æo~uƒßaj a kinpo~u ato~u misaƒßaraka to~u sinkiw no~u ¶o~u≈ãto~u≈ã, **** miƒß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ * ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ sa °ajawaj ƒßo~u a pisinkiw to~u ¶o~u≈ãto~u≈ã i afo~uƒßan, o~u sak ¶…ô ¶aj namisinnkiwan a ¶o~u≈ãto~u≈ã ¶i ƒßamito~u kar ¶aji, nikawrira niaro~u °an ƒßo~u no~u so~ufitaj no~u amirika ko~u afo~uƒßan. **** miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ sakakinato~usa a pisinkiw to~u ¶o~u≈ãto~un ¶i ƒßamito~u kar ¶aji ko~u maa…æaaj to~una sinkiw, to~uja miƒß…ô ¶a saka** fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ maro~u ° i kataja…æan. **** miƒß…ô ¶a pasa…æija…¨~…Æ ƒß…ô ¶a a misinkiw to~u ¶o~u≈ãto~u≈ã, ¶i kani ko~u maa…æaj ma…æa ¶o~u≈ãto~un, saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maro~u ° i kamaro~u °an no~u ¶o~u≈ãto~u≈ã, to~uro~u…ôn ni*ra ¶i apo~uto~u…æa ma…æakak…ôri…¨~…Æan no~u sifo~u. itija i **** miƒß…ô ¶a jo~u maa…æa ma…æa ¶o~u≈ãto~u≈ã no~u ami…æika ¶i o~upama maƒßapina≈ã ni≈ãra ko~u ¶aaj ko~u mama…æo~uwi…¨~…Æ ko~una …æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æ, sa mi…æ…ôka…æ mi…æijas ko~u so~ufitaj no~u amirika i **** miƒß…ô ¶a,i **** miƒß…ô ¶a to~u…æo~u a o~ufa…¨~…Æ ko~u mi…æijasaj so~ufitaj no~u amirika. **** miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ masaso~uwa…æ ko~u amirika ato~u ta…æipan i tatapa≈ãaj nijaro~u ° to~uƒßa no~u kata, makakak…ôto~un to~u so~uwa…æ:iko~ur no~u ** a fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ ƒßa °…ômin sato~u a mi…æijas to~u afo~uƒßan ko~u so~ufitaj no~u amirika, pa…æaƒß…ô ¶i ƒßan to~u ko~una ** a miƒß…ô ¶a ko~u kakaja ° a ka…æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æ. **** miƒß…ô ¶a nama…æa ¶o~u≈ãto~u≈ã no~u amirika ¶i pajt…ôn, ta≈ãso~u…æ sa ami…æ…ôka…æ to~una b~b~v…æa ¶kw…ô…æ…æ. ****: ** (* *o~u~u…æj ****). isb~b~vn *-***-*****- *. (******** *o~u~u…æj ****). *"***" . ****-**-**.
S.FORM: O Rikisi no Afohan Do'edoen ko tilid no mikakinkiway,nani anini i'ayaw no 5ofad miheca,iraay to ko tamdaw a maro' itini, o ciko no lalan no isifo'ay acia ko kaitinian nona kitakit,nengengen ko rikisi nona kitakit, cila malalood cila marawraw ko kasaniyaro', nawhani, nano to'asan malafiyaway to romaroma a hontian kitakit, patinakohan: Posi hontian kitakit, Koncie hontian sifo, Kuisan hontian kitakit, Tang Caw, Mutor hontian kitakit(Urto a sowal:ŸÖÿ∫ŸÑ€å€Å ÿ≥ŸÑÿ∑ŸÜÿ™‚Äé, falicen to:Mughliyah Saltanat‚Äé,Posi sowal :ŸÖÿ∫ŸÑ€å€Å ÿ≥ŸÑÿ∑ŸÜÿ™‚Äé,Roma tilid:mugÕühliyah saltanat,ÊÑèÁÇ∫"ËíôÂÖÄÂÖíËòá‰∏πÂúã", Cin Caw , Hontian Ikiris ato Rosya itinitay tona kitakit a malala'is. Ira ho ko katelang a Hontian Kirisiya Kitakit ato ci Cinkisuhan (ÊàêÂêâÊÄùÊ±ósowal no Monko:·Ý¥·Ý¢·Ý©·Ý≠·Ý¢·Ý∞ ·Ý¨·ÝÝ·Ý≠·ÝÝ·Ý®,ÈÆëÂüπËΩâÂØ´:ƒåinggis qaŒ≥an,tilid no Sirir:–ß–∏–Ω–≥–∏—Å —Ö–∞–∞–Ω). O Nikowan no Roma a Finacadan Ano nengnengen ko rikis no Afohan, kinapinapina to malengat a mapalo ato malowid no roma a finacadan, o roma 'i, o kakitaan no niyaro' sanga' saton niyah teked a sofitay milood to fiyaw a niyaro' malakitakit sato a malahad, patinako han i sasfo'an no 18sici, mapatireng ko Ayhamaytosa Tolani a hontian kitakit(ShƒÅh Durr-i-DurrƒÅn, 1724~1772),o sa'ayaway a kitakit itini. Ona honti tonini 'i, so'emetay ko faloco' orasaka pecihen ningra ko sera no kitakit a palilam to fiyafiyaw. Hakowaay ko kasasiromaroma finacadan ko mikowanay,silsil han i la'eno: Posi Hontian a Pikowan('ayaw no 6 siciÔºç'ayaw 330 miheca) Konci Hontian a Pikowan('ayaw 324mihecaÔºç'yaw187miheca) Pakotoriya Hontian Pikowan(latek 'ayaw no 250 mihecaÔºçlatek 'ayaw no 135 miheca) Kusan Hontian Kitakit(Kushan)(sili 1siciÔºç3sici) Tang ho(659 mihecaÔºç751 miheca) Arapiya Hontian Kitakit(751Âπ¥Ôºç820Âπ¥) Kacini Hontian Kitakit(962 mihecaÔºç1151 miheca) Posi Kol Hontian Kitakit(1151 mihecaÔºç1215 miheca) Posi Kalti Hontian Kitakit(1245 mihecaÔºç1389 miheca) Timol Hontian Kitakit(1389 mihecaÔºç1507 miheca) Monor Hontian Kitakit(Mughliyah Saltanat‚Äé)(16 siciÔºç1747 miheca) Afohan Hontian Kitakit Toranni Hontian Kitakit(1747 mihecaÔºç1826 miheca) Palakocayi Hontian Kitakit(1836 mihecaÔºç1973 miheca) Ingataay Miheca No aniniay a Afohan Kitakit namapatireng itiyaay ho 1746 miheca Toranni Hotian miheca, ono aniniay to a Afohan kitakit 'i, 1747 miheca a , o ikor tono 19sici malikelong to ko 'icel nona kitakit, sa itira a mala'afas ko Ikiris ato Rosiya to sapi'ecoaw a maro'. Ya malahonti ci Amanula(Amanullah Khan, ÿ£ŸÖÿßŸÜ ÿßŸÑŸÑŸá ÿÆÿßŸÜ ,) ta misiiked a mapatireng ko aniniay a kitakit i 1919 miheca ,itira ko pisa'eli to Ikiris to malalenay a kakaketonan a tilid, manaay ko Ikiris orasaka misatapang to sakakinatolo a pilood to Ikiris,yo malowid to ko Ikiris i, matatilid to malalenay a kakaketonan i 1921miheca 11 folad 22 romi'ad,caay to ko kakowanan no Ikiris. Nikawrira, nani 1900 miheca taha 2001 miheca 11 ko malatapangay a mikowan tona kitakit awaay ko pakalaheciay to kalatapang i kamaro'an. O samahinakeray a mihecaan no Afohan 'i, itiray i kalahontian ni Mohanmot Casirsa( nani 1933 miheca tahira i 1973 miheca. Itiya i 1973 miheca mafelih no cecaay ko pona a salikaka ningra ci Mohanmot Tautehan , mapalasawad ko hontian a faco no kitakit. 1978 miheca ira ko picoker no Rosiya to Afohan Kalotamdawan Tang a mifelih to sifo, ci Mohanmot Tautehan ato laloma'an 'aloman ko mipatayan. Tomireng to kona Afohan Kalotamdawan Tang mitatoy to sakowan no kitakit, nikawrira palili'en no Amirika to payso ko Islam Sofitay )mamifelih to aniniay a sifo, sapidipotaw to aniniay a sifo ko Rosiya i 1979 miheca 12 folad 24 romi'ad ocor han to ko sofitay a mitoker to nicokeran no Amirika a komi,na onini to ko sakala'aised no Rosiya ato Akirika, satapang sato ko lalood to mo'etep ko mihecan, 'aloman ko mahikedaay a kalotamdaw tona lalood, 1989 miheca sawad sato ko Rosiya a malalood nokay sanay to ko polong no sofitay. Nikapolongan Kitakit Nani ikor tono 1970 miheca, wataay to ko nikapadesan nona kitakit to lalood ato rawraw,ano irairaay ko pipasasinga'ay no roma a kitakit, caay ka tangsol sa a malali'ay ko malalooday, itiya sato i 2001 miheca warawar han to palasawad koya ci'icelay a mikowan nani 1996 miheca a Talipan Sifo Itini tona Nikapolongan Kitakit a pikowanan a mihwca i,masasiromaroma ho 6 a sifo: Afohan Nikapolongan kitakit (1973 miheca -1978 miheca) Afohan Finawlan Kitakit (1978 miheca -1992 miheca) Afohan Islam Kitakit (1992-1996) Afohan Islam Kakitaan Kitakit (1996-2001) Afohan Islam Kitakit (pacarcaran sifo 2001-2004) Afohan Islam Nikapolongan Kitakit (2004-) Ikor no 2000 miheca(2000Âπ¥‰ª•Âæå) Ikaleponan no 2001 miheca, masaopo ko kakeridan no masacefacefangay i Toic masasowal, mihai patireng to fa'elohay a faco no sifo, matoro' ci Hamito Karcayi mala'ayaway kamaro'an tamdaw no pacarcaray sifo, tona kasasowal 'i, malaheci a miketon to sapisanga'aw to fa'elohay a kinpo ato misaharaka to sinkiw no congtong, 2004 miheca 10 folad 9 romi'ad sa'ayaway ho a pisinkiw to congtong i Afohan, o sakcecay namisinnkiwan a congtong ci Hamito Karcayi, nikawrira niaro'an ho no sofitay no Amirika ko Afohan. 2009 miheca saka 8 folad sakakinatosa a pisinkiw to congton ci Hamito Karcayi ko maalaay tona sinkiw, toya miheca saka11 folad maro' i katayalan. 2014 miheca pasaliyad heca a misinkiw to congtong,ci Kani ko maalay malacongton, saka 9 folad saka 29 romi'ad maro' i kamaro'an no congtong, toroen nigra ci Apotola malakakeridan no sifo. Itiya i 2009 miheca yo maala malacongtong no Amilika ci Opama mahapinang ningra ko caay ko mamalowid kona lalood, sa milekal miliyas ko sofitay no Amirika i 2014 miheca,i 2015 miheca tolo a ofad ko miliyasay sofitay no Amirika. 2020 miheca saka 2 folad saka 29 romi'ad masasowal ko Amirika ato Talipan i tatapangay niyaro' Toha no Kata, makakaketon to sowal:ikor no 14 a folad ha'emin sato a miliyas to Afohan ko sofitay no Amirika, palaheci han to kona 18 a miheca ko kakaya' a kalalood. 2021 miheca namalacongtong no Amirika ci Payten, tangsol sa amilekal tona aniniay miheca saka 9 folad lahecien no sofitay a miliyas ko Afohan. Pihapinangan Tilid . 2016-10-05 (2016-10-11). Vogelsang, Willem. The Afghans. Wiley Blackwell. 2002: 18 (6 July 2019). ISBN 0-631-19841- 5. (ÂéüÂßãÂÖßÂÆπÂ≠òÊ™îÊñº9 July 2019). Ë¶ã"Êñ∞ÂÖÉÂè≤" . 2020-03-01.
S.PHON: o~u rikisi no~u afo~uƒßan …¨~…Æo~u °…ô…¨~…Æo~u…ôn ko~u ti…æi…¨~…Æ no~u mikakinkiwaj,nani anini i °ajaw no~u *o~ufa…¨~…Æ miƒß…ô ¶a,iraaj to~u ko~u tam…¨~…Æaw a maro~u ° itini, o~u ¶iko~u no~u …æa…æan no~u isifo~u °aj a ¶ia ko~u kaitinian no~una kitakit,n…ô≈ã…ô≈ã…ôn ko~u rikisi no~una kitakit, ¶i…æa ma…æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æ ¶i…æa marawraw ko~u kasanijaro~u °, nawƒßani, nano~u to~u °asan ma…æafijawaj to~u ro~umaro~uma a ƒßo~untian kitakit, patinako~uƒßan: po~usi ƒßo~untian kitakit, ko~un ¶i…ô ƒßo~untian sifo~u, ko~u~uisan ƒßo~untian kitakit, ta≈ã ¶aw, mo~u~uto~ur ƒßo~untian kitakit(o~u~urto~u a so~uwa…æ:***** ******, fa…æi ¶…ôn to~u:mo~u~u*ƒß…æijaƒß sa…ætanat*,po~usi so~uwa…æ :***** ******,ro~uma ti…æi…¨~…Æ:mo~u~u**ƒß…æijaƒß sa…ætanat,**"******", ¶in ¶aw , ƒßo~untian ikiris ato~u ro~usja itinitaj to~una kitakit a ma…æa…æa °is. ira ƒßo~u ko~u kat…ô…æa≈ã a ƒßo~untian kirisija kitakit ato~u ¶i ¶inkiso~u~uƒßan (****so~uwa…æ no~u mo~unko~u:****** *****,****:*i≈ã*is patinako~u ƒßan i sasfo~u °an no~u **si ¶i, mapatir…ô≈ã ko~u ajƒßamajto~usa to~u…æani a ƒßo~untian kitakit(sƒß*ƒß …¨~…Æo~u~urr-i-…¨~…Æo~u~urr*n, ****~****),o~u sa °ajawaj a kitakit itini. o~una miko~uwanaj,si…æsi…æ ƒßan i …æa °…ôno~u: po~usi ƒßo~untian a piko~uwan( °ajaw no~u * si ¶i* °ajaw *** miƒß…ô ¶a) ko~un ¶i ƒßo~untian a piko~uwan( °ajaw ***miƒß…ô ¶a* °jaw***miƒß…ô ¶a) pako~uto~urija °afas ko~u ikiris ato~u ro~usija to~u sapi °…ô ¶o~uaw a maro~u °. ja ma…æaƒßo~unti ¶i amano~u~u…æa(amano~u~u…æ…æaƒß kƒßan, **** **** *** ,) ta misiik…ô…¨~…Æ a mapatir…ô≈ã ko~u aniniaj a kitakit i **** i ka…æaƒßo~untian ni mo~uƒßanmo~ut ¶asirsa( nani **** miƒß…ô ¶a taƒßira i **** miƒß…ô ¶a. itija i **** miƒß…ô ¶a maf…ô…æiƒß no~u ¶…ô ¶aaj ko~u po~una a sa…æikaka ni≈ãra ¶i mo~uƒßanmo~ut tao~u~ut…ôƒßan , mapa…æasawa…¨~…Æ ko~u ƒßo~untian a fa ¶o~u no~u kitakit. **** miƒß…ô ¶a ira ko~u pi ¶o~uk…ôr no~u ro~usija to~u afo~uƒßan ka…æo~utam…¨~…Æawan ta≈ã a mif…ô…æiƒß to~u sifo~u, ¶i mo~uƒßanmo~ut tao~u~ut…ôƒßan ato~u …æa…æo~uma °an °a…æo~uman ko~u mipatajan. to~umir…ô≈ã to~u ko~una afo~uƒßan ka…æo~utam…¨~…Æawan ta≈ã mitato~uj to~u sako~uwan no~u kitakit, nikawrira pa…æi…æi °…ôn no~u amirika to~u pajso~u ko~u is…æam so~ufitaj )mamif…ô…æiƒß to~u aniniaj a sifo~u, sapi…¨~…Æipo~utaw to~u aniniaj a sifo~u ko~u ro~usija i **** miƒß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ o~u ¶o~ur ƒßan to~u ko~u so~ufitaj a mito~uk…ôr to~u ni ¶o~uk…ôran no~u amirika a ko~umi,na o~unini to~u ko~u saka…æa °ais…ô…¨~…Æ no~u ro~usija ato~u akirika, satapa≈ã sato~u ko~u …æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æ to~u mo~u °…ôt…ôp ko~u miƒß…ô ¶an, °a…æo~uman ko~u maƒßik…ô…¨~…Æaaj a ka…æo~utam…¨~…Æaw to~una …æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æ, **** miƒß…ô ¶a sawa…¨~…Æ sato~u ko~u ro~usija a ma…æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æ no~ukaj sanaj to~u ko~u po~u…æo~u≈ã no~u so~ufitaj. nikapo~u…æo~u≈ãan kitakit nani iko~ur to~uno~u **** miƒß…ô ¶a, wataaj to~u ko~u nikapa…¨~…Æ…ôsan no~una kitakit to~u …æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æ ato~u rawraw,ano~u irairaaj ko~u pipasasi≈ãa °aj no~u ro~uma a kitakit, ¶aaj ka ta≈ãso~u…æ sa a ma…æa…æi °aj ko~u ma…æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æaj, itija sato~u i **** miƒß…ô ¶a warawar ƒßan to~u pa…æasawa…¨~…Æ ko~uja ¶i °i ¶…ô…æaj a miko~uwan nani **** miƒß…ô ¶a a ta…æipan sifo~u itini to~una nikapo~u…æo~u≈ãan kitakit a piko~uwanan a miƒßw ¶a i,masasiro~umaro~uma ƒßo~u * a sifo~u: afo~uƒßan nikapo~u…æo~u≈ãan kitakit (**** miƒß…ô ¶a -**** miƒß…ô ¶a) afo~uƒßan is…æam nikapo~u…æo~u≈ãan kitakit (****-) iko~ur no~u **** miƒß…ô ¶a(*******) ika…æ…ôpo~unan no~u **** miƒß…ô ¶a, masao~upo~u ko~u kak…ôri…¨~…Æan no~u masa ¶…ôfa ¶…ôfa≈ãaj i to~ui ¶ masaso~uwa…æ, miƒßai patir…ô≈ã to~u fa °…ô…æo~uƒßaj a fa ¶o~u no~u sifo~u, mato~uro~u ° ¶i ƒßamito~u kar ¶aji ma…æa °ajawaj kamaro~u °an tam…¨~…Æaw no~u pa ¶ar ¶araj sifo~u, to~una kasaso~uwa…æ °i, ma…æaƒß…ô ¶i a mik…ôto~un to~u sapisa≈ãa °aw to~u fa °…ô…æo~uƒßaj a kinpo~u ato~u misaƒßaraka to~u sinkiw no~u ¶o~u≈ãto~u≈ã, **** miƒß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ * ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ sa °ajawaj ƒßo~u a pisinkiw to~u ¶o~u≈ãto~u≈ã i afo~uƒßan, o~u sak ¶…ô ¶aj namisinnkiwan a ¶o~u≈ãto~u≈ã ¶i ƒßamito~u kar ¶aji, nikawrira niaro~u °an ƒßo~u no~u so~ufitaj no~u amirika ko~u afo~uƒßan. **** miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ sakakinato~usa a pisinkiw to~u ¶o~u≈ãto~un ¶i ƒßamito~u kar ¶aji ko~u maa…æaaj to~una sinkiw, to~uja miƒß…ô ¶a saka** fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ maro~u ° i kataja…æan. **** miƒß…ô ¶a pasa…æija…¨~…Æ ƒß…ô ¶a a misinkiw to~u ¶o~u≈ãto~u≈ã, ¶i kani ko~u maa…æaj ma…æa ¶o~u≈ãto~un, saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maro~u ° i kamaro~u °an no~u ¶o~u≈ãto~u≈ã, to~uro~u…ôn ni*ra ¶i apo~uto~u…æa ma…æakak…ôri…¨~…Æan no~u sifo~u. itija i **** miƒß…ô ¶a jo~u maa…æa ma…æa ¶o~u≈ãto~u≈ã no~u ami…æika ¶i o~upama maƒßapina≈ã ni≈ãra ko~u ¶aaj ko~u mama…æo~uwi…¨~…Æ ko~una …æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æ, sa mi…æ…ôka…æ mi…æijas ko~u so~ufitaj no~u amirika i **** miƒß…ô ¶a,i **** miƒß…ô ¶a to~u…æo~u a o~ufa…¨~…Æ ko~u mi…æijasaj so~ufitaj no~u amirika. **** miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ masaso~uwa…æ ko~u amirika ato~u ta…æipan i tatapa≈ãaj nijaro~u ° to~uƒßa no~u kata, makakak…ôto~un to~u so~uwa…æ:iko~ur no~u ** a fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ ƒßa °…ômin sato~u a mi…æijas to~u afo~uƒßan ko~u so~ufitaj no~u amirika, pa…æaƒß…ô ¶i ƒßan to~u ko~una ** a miƒß…ô ¶a ko~u kakaja ° a ka…æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æ. **** miƒß…ô ¶a nama…æa ¶o~u≈ãto~u≈ã no~u amirika ¶i pajt…ôn, ta≈ãso~u…æ sa ami…æ…ôka…æ to~una aniniaj miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ …æaƒß…ô ¶i…ôn no~u so~ufitaj a mi…æijas ko~u afo~uƒßan. piƒßapina≈ãan ti…æi…¨~…Æ . ****-**-** (****-**-**). b~vo~u*…ô…æsa≈ã, wi…æ…æ…ôm. tƒß…ô af*ƒßans. wi…æ…ôj b~b~v…æa ¶kw…ô…æ…æ. ****: ** (* *o~u~u…æj ****). isb~b~vn *-***-*****- *.
